pi_items.source: Verified in task.json metadata, used by verifier.py, matches task description. Synthetic task configuration value.
Verified in task.json metadata, used by verifier.py, matches task description. Synthetic task configuration value.
Verified from docker-compose.yml (line 25: PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080), port mapping 8080:80 (line 7), setup_jitsi.sh (line 84), and task_utils.sh (line 4: JITSI_BASE_URL default)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to join a Jitsi Meet video conference room named 'TownHall_2024_Auditor' with display name 'Silent_Observer' at http://localhost:8080. The agent must mute both microphone and camera on the Pre-Join (Lobby) screen before joining. All task data is synthetic - the room name, display name, and localhost URL are test configuration values for this benchmark environment.
